mp1.features.0: Nucleu de sol intact de lungime completă (0–90 cm) pentru vizibilitatea profilului
mp1.features.1: Control al adâncimii cu precizie în centimetri
mp1.features.3: Îndepărtare manuală a nucleului pentru integritatea probei
mp1.features.4: Se potrivește pe pick-up-uri, remorci și vehicule ușoare
mp1.features.5: Posibilitate de upgrade la MP-3.90 sau MP-4.100
mp1.howToUse.0: Step 1 – Impact Insertion: A grooved rod is driven into the soil using a high-frequency hydraulic hammer. It sounds aggressive, but it's all very civilised.
mp1.howToUse.1: Step 2 – Hydraulic Retraction with Rotation: The rod is rotated and retracted hydraulically, ensuring the core stays pristine. Surgical precision, minus the scalpel.
mp1.howToUse.2: Step 3 – Core Revelation: The unbroken soil core is exposed for scientific admiration. All layers visible—from humus to hardpan.
mp1.howToUse.3: Step 4 – Manual Core Discharge: The core is manually removed. It's a quiet, satisfying moment of science. Like pulling data out of the Earth with your hands.
mp2.features.1: Smart logic: discards or keeps samples based on your settings
mp2.features.3: Layer separation option for horizon-specific sampling
mp2.features.5: Customisable sampling Adâncime and horizon count
mp2.features.7: Built for real, daily use – not just weekend hobbyists
mp2.howToUse.0: Drives a grooved rod into the soil using a high-frequency hydraulic hammer — yes, it sounds as satisfying as it is
mp2.howToUse.1: Hydraulically rotates and retracts the rod without disturbing your samples
mp2.howToUse.2: Samples are automatically discharged into their proper containers
mp2.howToUse.3: Optional layer separation sorts the soil by horizon during extraction
mp2.applications.3: Field sampling on a budget with ambitions
mp3.features.0: Fully automatic extraction down to 95 cm
mp3.features.2: Takes 3 consecutive samples without leaving the seat
mp3.features.3: Mounts on pickups, trailers, or anything vaguely roadworthy
mp3.features.4: Auto-discharge and sample sorting during extraction
mp3.features.5: Customizable sampling Adâncime and horizon count
mp3.features.7: Auto-shutdown when it hits a rock and says 'nope'
mp3.features.8: Smart logic: discards or keeps samples based on settings
mp3.features.9: Built for serious, continuous use — this isn't your casual, once-in-a-while gadget.
mp3.howToUse.0: Drives a serious-looking grooved rod into the soil with a high-frequency hydraulic hammer — think of it as a very precise poke
mp3.howToUse.1: Hydraulically rotates and retracts the rod, avoiding the sort of brutish yanking that upsets soil and engineers alike
mp3.howToUse.2: Automatically empties the auger on the way up — no scooping, no fiddling, just a polite drop into the sample containers
mp3.howToUse.3: Distributes sample material neatly into separate containers depending on soil horizon — because even dirt should know where it belongs
mp3.applications.4: Field work where speed, accuracy, and coffee breaks matter
mp4.features.2: Auto-discharge and sample sorting during extraction
mp4.features.3: Smart logic: discards or keeps samples based on your settings
mp4.features.4: Customizable sampling Adâncime and horizon count
mp4.features.5: Mounts on pickups, trailers, or anything vaguely roadworthy
mp4.features.9: Built for real, daily use – not just occasional science days
mp4.howToUse.0: Drives a grooved rod into the soil using a high-frequency hydraulic hammer — elegantly brutal
mp4.howToUse.1: Hydraulically rotates and retracts the rod — no yanking, no drama
mp4.howToUse.2: Automatically empties the auger into appropriate containers on the way up
mp4.howToUse.3: Distributes sample material neatly into separate containers depending on soil horizon
mp4.applications.4: Field work requiring serious Adâncime and sample fidelity
dh.features.0: Hydraulic drive for dependable, powerful drilling
dh.features.2: Not affected by vehicle suspension—no surprises underground
dh.features.3: Two preset Adâncimes for fast switching
dh.features.5: Mounts easily on a range of light vehicles
dh.applications.1: Precision farming (with a bit of old-school power)
dh.howToUse.0: Park your rig and position the sampler where the soil's calling.
dh.howToUse.1: Select your preferred Adâncime (yes, down to the millimetre).
dh.howToUse.2: Hit the button and let the hydraulic muscle do the heavy lifting.
dh.howToUse.3: Pull out your perfect soil core and feel quietly pleased with yourself.
de.features.0: Fully electric drilling for clean, precise sampling
de.features.1: Millimeter-precise Adâncime adjustment (because close enough isn't good enough)
de.features.2: Independent of vehicle suspension to avoid Adâncime tantrums
de.features.5: Runs on a 24 V external battery pack (sold separately)
de.applications.1: Precision farming with a bit of style
de.howToUse.0: Position the sampler where the soil needs a look-see.
de.howToUse.1: Choose your Adâncime. Millimeter increments, because we're picky.
de.howToUse.2: Press the button and watch the electric drill politely do its job.
de.howToUse.3: Pull out the soil core and marvel at your perfectly sampled earth.
boprob.features.2: Samples while driving—no need to stop
boprob.features.3: 7-inch touchscreen display for control and monitoring
boprob.features.4: Optional onboard camera for visual feedback
boprob.features.5: Low soil compaction from 235/60 R16 wheels
boprob.features.6: No tractor mods needed—trailer mounts quickly
boprob.applications.1: Precision farming with minimal fuel use
boprob.applications.2: Soil health monitoring on large acreages
boprob.howToUse.0: Attach the trailer to a suitable tractor or tow-capable vehicle—no modifications needed.
boprob.howToUse.1: Set your desired Adâncime and sample interval on the touchscreen.
boprob.howToUse.2: Drive at 4–15 km/h and let the machine sample automatically.
boprob.howToUse.3: Check camera and screen as needed, or just carry on farming.
boprob.howToUse.4: When 16 samples are collected, empty and reload the magazine.
laydown.specs.0: Standard 50 mm tow hitch with a 13‑pin 12 V socket required.
laydown.specs.2: EN 10025 S355 steel, powder-coated, 4 mm thick
laydown.features.1: TÜV‑approved for road and field use

laydown.features.5: Supports external power packs (hydraulic or battery)
laydown.applications.2: Hydraulic MP‑series or electric DE/DH samplers

laydown.howToUse.1: Vehicle has a 13‑pin 12 V socket (for DE‑1.30)? Check.
laydown.howToUse.3: Fold down, test power, and begin sampling.
tph.specs.0: Se potrivește Cat‑1 or Cat‑2 tractor 3‑point PTO systems
tph.specs.3: Compatible with all MP-series, DH, and DE soil sampling machines
tph.features.0: Welded A‑frame steel—sturdy enough for actual work
tph.features.1: PTO pump mount—because zip ties aren't engineering
tph.features.2: Black epoxy finish—like paint, but smarter
tph.features.3: Comes with bolts and lift bars—no scrounging required
tph.features.5: Works with MP, DH, and DE samplers
tph.applications.2: Tractor retroSe potrivește that make sense
tph.howToUse.0: Attach to lift arms—tighten like you mean it

fc.specs.1: Custom powder-coated steel frame with aluminium tool panels
fc.specs.2: OEM parts removed and stored; frame TÜV-certified
fc.specs.3: Supports all MP-series, DH, and DE soil samplers
fc.features.0: Universal fit for pickups and UTVs (Hilux, Gator, Kubota, etc.)

fc.features.2: Supports tool storage, lighting, coolers, and sampler systems
fc.features.4: Fully compatible with all MP, DE, and DH machines
fc.applications.1: Fleet builds for large-scale soil sampling
fc.applications.2: Upgrades for agricultural and environmental research vehicles
fc.howToUse.0: Select your sampling machine — MP-series, DH, or DE. Sensible choices, all of them.
fc.howToUse.1: Ensure your vehicle has a hitch receiver or trailer coupling. If not, one can be arranged. We're not savages.
fc.howToUse.2: Bring us the vehicle — or let us source a suitable model.
fc.howToUse.3: We fit the steel frame, bolt on the sampler, handle the paperwork, and send you off to do battle with soil.
trailer.specs.0: Hot-dip galvanised—rust doesn't stand a chance.
trailer.specs.1: Braked or non-braked options: choose your level of control
trailer.features.0: Hot-dip galvanised body and chassis—long life, fewer complaints
trailer.features.1: Braked and non-braked options—pick your handling style
trailer.features.2: Single-axle with mechanical drum brakes for stable towing
trailer.features.3: Shock absorbers for 100 km/h road approval—smooth ride, no rattling
trailer.features.4: Track width 1.35 m with jack‑castor wheels included
trailer.features.5: LT285/75 R16 aluminium rims or MT215/75 R15 steel—tread the fields, not flip over
trailer.features.6: Support wheel included for easy hand maneuvering
trailer.features.7: Built to haul MP-series, DH, and DE samplers—no IKEA instructions required
trailer.features.8: Integrated tool, light, and cooler storage—work smarter, not harder
trailer.applications.0: Field transport of MP, DH, and DE sampler kits
trailer.applications.1: Hauling crates, coolboxes, and more across farms
trailer.applications.2: Light-duty environments, both rural and contracting sites
trailer.howToUse.0: Select braked or non-braked depending on your towing vehicle and load.
trailer.howToUse.1: Hitched with standard 50 mm ball coupling—no exotic engineering required.
trailer.howToUse.2: Load your sampler and kit, secure all straps and tie-downs.
trailer.howToUse.3: Tow it at sensible speeds—no drifting or unintended adventure.
powerpack.specs.0: Hydraulic or electric powered to fit your power needs
powerpack.specs.1: Portable, durable steel casing built for rough fieldwork
powerpack.specs.2: LCD battery status on electric models—know your charge at a glance
powerpack.specs.3: Return and suction filtration included for clean hydraulic operation
powerpack.features.0: Hydraulic or electric powered to suit your workflow
powerpack.features.1: Rugged steel casing with corrosion protection
powerpack.features.2: LCD battery status on electric models
powerpack.features.3: Return and suction filtration for hydraulic longevity
powerpack.features.4: Portable and easy to mount or transport
powerpack.applications.0: Power source for MP-series and DH-series soil samplers
powerpack.applications.1: Field operations requiring independent hydraulic or electric power
powerpack.applications.2: Remote sampling locations without vehicle power supply
powerpack.howToUse.0: Pick hydraulic or electric depending on how much oomph your sampler demands (and how fancy you feel).
powerpack.howToUse.1: Bolt it on securely to your vehicle or trailer—no improvising with duct tape, please.
powerpack.howToUse.2: Keep an eye on power levels via LCD (electric) or fuel/oil gauges (hydraulic)—because surprises are for birthday parties, not fieldwork.
powerpack.howToUse.3: Top up oil and change filters regularly—treat it well, and it'll keep your sampler humming like a charm.
spareparts.specs.1: Critical components for high-wear and mission-critical assemblies
spareparts.specs.2: Individually packaged, labelled, and field-service ready

spareparts.applications.1: Keeping high-wear components in service-ready condition
spareparts.applications.2: Avoiding project delays due to unavailable parts
spareparts.howToUse.0: Keep one kit per machine—because nobody likes cannibalising parts from the unit you're not using.
spareparts.howToUse.1: Replace high-wear components according to service intervals or visible wear.
spareparts.howToUse.2: Use only the labelled components for their intended locations (guessing is not heroic, it's expensive).
spareparts.howToUse.3: Restock your kit after use so you're never caught without it twice.

probes.specs.1: Conical taper profile (40→38 mm / 35→33 mm / 30→28 mm)
probes.specs.3: Compatible with N-min sampling protocols (VDLUFA, ISO 14255)
probes.features.0: Three tapered diameters minimize friction and maximize sampling ease
probes.features.1: HRC 52 hardened tool steel for durability and strength
probes.features.2: Laser-etched Adâncime markings every 10 cm for precise sampling
probes.features.3: Pre-broken cutting edges for consistent, clean penetration
probes.features.4: Compatible with toggle handles and chisels for efficient sample extraction
probes.applications.2: Manual sampling in hard, stony, or clay-heavy soils

probes.howToUse.1: Rotate the rod while applying downward pressure; taper does the heavy lifting
probes.howToUse.2: Use toggle handles (Items 1030 or 1031) to extract the rod smoothly
probes.howToUse.3: Clean soil residues with the chisel (Item 1051) to maintain groove integrity between samples

drillrods.howToUse.1: Use appropriate striking head with hand hammer or machine
drillrods.howToUse.2: Tighten rod sections using special wrenches (SW 18)

hammers.howToUse.1: Use appropriate handle length for leverage and comfort
hammers.howToUse.2: Replace hammer heads or inserts as needed for optimal performance
hammers.howToUse.3: Maintain wooden handles and tighten screws regularly
goettingerDrills.specs.0: Designed for Nmin sampling down to 90 cm
goettingerDrills.specs.2: Specially hardened steel groove ensures minimal friction
goettingerDrills.specs.3: Three interlocking drill diameters optimize insertion and extraction
goettingerDrills.features.2: Higher efficiency than conventional hand tools
goettingerDrills.features.4: Safe for drains, cables, and underground lines
goettingerDrills.features.7: Improved grip comfort thanks to reinforced handle padding
goettingerDrills.applications.0: Manual Nmin soil sampling in light soils
goettingerDrills.applications.1: Field conditions where machinery cannot be used
goettingerDrills.applications.2: Reliable layer separation for precise analysis
goettingerDrills.howToUse.0: Insert the corer by hand into the soil
goettingerDrills.howToUse.1: Pull out carefully to collect the sample
goettingerDrills.howToUse.2: Repeat 16 parallel strikes per Adâncime section for reliable results
goettingerDrills.howToUse.3: Avoid rocky or overly compacted soils
raupe.specs.3: Manual visual check for each core
raupe.features.0: Hydraulic semi-automat extraction down to 90 cm (optional 120 cm)
raupe.features.2: Manual core inspection keeps you in charge
raupe.features.3: Carrier engine powers the hydraulic system—no extra motors
raupe.features.4: Remote control: raise, lower, rotate, sample
raupe.features.5: Tracks are narrow for passage between corn
raupe.features.6: High-frequency hydraulic hammer (2400 blows/min, 40J per blow)
raupe.features.8: Quick spare parts service (2h) and repairs on-site (12h)
raupe.howToUse.0: Drive the crawler to the sampling site
raupe.howToUse.1: Lay the machine down for stability during travel if needed
raupe.howToUse.2: Raise the sampling rod upright via remote control
raupe.howToUse.3: Hydraulically drive the rod into the soil and rotate to extract the core
raupe.howToUse.4: Repeat for the three layers: 0–30, 30–60, 60–90 cm
raupe.howToUse.5: Remove core, inspect visually, and store in waterproof containers
raupe.applications.3: Field work on slopes and rough terrain
